first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new concepts or change the emphasis of the assessment. Both evaluations consistently focus on the same perceived gaps in the candidate's profile: a lack of director-level strategic experience and deep AI expertise.
